refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance targets
Structured database schema for requirement recording
Version-controlled management system for updates and history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software subsystem combining derivation engine, structured recording database, and version-controlled update management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation and recording due to traceability requirements
Update management depends on recorded data consistency
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize interface complexity and maintain coherence.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality demands rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management if complexity grows to reduce diffusion risk.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software subsystem responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports update synchronization and history management across distributed modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as all DP functions are centralized here; low diffusion risk.
Poor containment; would cause high diffusion if assigned here.
Not relevant for performance requirement management.
Limited relevance; assigning here would increase diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the DP in the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and update management effectively.
containment_risks: Potential overload of NGHE Solution module if other unrelated functions are also assigned here
Dependency on reliable network link for update synchronization
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider splitting if complexity or diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear traceability and update management.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized assignment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within the NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to a single implementation module supports ownership and verification.

recommended_revisions: Review update management complexity in future levels to avoid module overload
Validate interface definitions with Telemetry and Network Link for data integrity

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, the FR is not yet atomic and further refinement of sub-FRs is needed to fully capture all aspects of performance requirement management.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To further decompose sub-FRs into atomic elements enabling clearer DP and IM mapping in subsequent levels.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated DP functions
open_risks: Potential module overload if complexity increases
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability from inputs to performance targets
Validation of update management process and history maintenance
